title: centaurea × devensis
intro: Centaurea × devensis, a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Cornflower (Centaurea cyanus) and Centaurea montana, is a flowering perennial commonly found in meadows and grasslands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × devensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
